saveframes.name: reference_1
tags:
The 13C chemical shift was referenced to the methylene signal of adamantane
resonating at 31.5 ppm which gives chemical shift relative to DSS.
The 15N chemical shift reference was computed from the ratios of resonance
frequencies in the IUPAC recommendations.
